10101000000010110010011111110001101 - ASI: 19

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  101 = 1 * 01
  111 = 1 * 11
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0110 = 01 * 10
  11111 = 11 * 111
  010000 = 0100 * 00
  110001 = 11 * 0001
  00010110 = 0001 * 0110
  010011111 = 0100 * 11111
  101010000 = 101 * 010000
  110001101 = 110001 * 101
  10101000000010110 = 101010000 * 00010110
  010011111110001101 = 010011111 * 110001101
  10101000000010110010011111110001101 = 10101000000010110 * 010011111110001101
